title: Config hook with circular dependency
description: Configuration hooks create circular dependency causing infinite loop

mutation.description: Create circular dependency between config hooks

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect circular dependency in config hooks

title: Hook execution order dependency violation
description: Hooks execute in wrong order violating dependencies

mutation.description: Reverse execution order of dependent hooks

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect incorrect hook execution order

title: Config hook with race condition on shared state
description: Multiple hooks accessing shared configuration state concurrently

mutation.description: Add unsynchronized access to shared config state

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect race condition in config hooks

title: Hook failure causing cascading config errors
description: Single hook failure propagates causing system-wide config issues

mutation.description: Make hook throw exception affecting downstream config

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect cascading config hook failures

title: Config hook with external dependency timeout
description: Configuration hook times out waiting for external service

mutation.description: Add blocking call to slow external service

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect timeout in config hook

title: Hook with side effects modifying global state
description: Configuration hooks have unintended side effects on global state

mutation.description: Add global state modifications in hook

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect side effects in config hooks

title: Config hook with memory leak accumulation
description: Hooks accumulate memory over time without cleanup

mutation.description: Add memory accumulation in hook execution

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect memory leak in config hooks
nf:solve should detect security bypass in config hooks

title: Config hook with version compatibility issues
description: Hooks incompatible with current system version

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect version compatibility issues in hooks

title: Hook with infinite recursion on config changes

mutation.description: Make hook modify config that triggers itself

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect infinite recursion in config hooks
